title: Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
